vibe: Boutique day spa meets modern wellness brand, highly animated, premium feel

typography.instructions: Use light font weights for elegance (font-light to font-normal). Headings should be sage green unless inverted on dark backgrounds. Logo cursive font is for 'Marlinda\'s' only.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7A8B6F] text-[#F5F1EA] hover:bg-[#5C6B50] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 transform hover:scale-105 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4A5A5] focus:outline-none
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4A5A5] text-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#C28C8C] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 transform hover:scale-105 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7A8B6F] focus:outline-none
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#7A8B6F] hover:bg-[#7A8B6F]/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7A8B6F]

navigation.desktop: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#F5F1EA]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#7A8B6F]/20 transition-all duration-300
navigation.mobile_drawer: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-full md:w-sm bg-[#7A8B6F] z-[100] p-8 text-[#F5F1EA]
navigation.nav_links: relative text-[#2C2C2C] hover:text-[#7A8B6F] transition-colors after:content-[''] after:absolute after:w-full after:scale-x-0 after:h-0.5 after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:bg-[#7A8B6F] after:origin-bottom-right after:transition-transform after:duration-300 hover:after:scale-x-100 hover:after:origin-bottom-left

cards.service: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-[#7A8B6F]/10 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(122,139,111,0.12)] transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2

forms.input: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#7A8B6F]/30 pb-3 text-[#2C2C2C] placeholder-[#7A8B6F]/50 focus:border-[#7A8B6F] focus:outline-none transition-colors rounded-none

motion.hero: Slow Ken Burns zoom (scale from 1.1 to 1 over 10s ease-out), staggered fade-in text (word by word, delay 0.1s)
motion.scroll_reveal: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}
motion.parallax: Use React Spring or Framer Motion useScroll for subtle background image shifts
motion.team_card: Card flip or expand on click to reveal bio
motion.counters: Count up animation using framer-motion or react-countup for Google and Yelp ratings
motion.floating_cta: Infinite slow pulse keyframes for the Book Now button on mobile
motion.drawer: Slide in from right (x: 100% -> x: 0) with staggered fade-in for list items
motion.page_load: Logo briefly centered with opacity 1, then fade out and slide up to reveal page

hero_background.alt: Marlinda's Mod Skincare Storefront Cedar Wood
hero_background.placement: Hero section background with dark/sage overlay

story_section.placement: Story Behind Our Beauty (Marlinda's Bio) side image

spa_ambiance.alt: Elegant indoor spa room with natural oil bottles
spa_ambiance.placement: Background visual or inter-section parallax image

facial_ambiance.alt: Woman enjoying a relaxing facial treatment

media.treatment_overlay: Soft grain/noise overlay for warmth and organic botanical shadows where applicable.

content.team_card_instructions: Use initial-based circular avatars (sage green letter on cream background) centered in the top area. The bottom area must be a sage green block containing the serif name and role.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on sage and cream backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards. The sage text on cream background is high contrast.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7A8B6F].
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all heavy animations.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page marketing site using pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn for complex interactives (like FAQ accordion).
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings, 'Manrope' for body, and 'Great Vibes' specifically for the word 'Marlinda\'s'. Include Google Fonts links in HTML head.
Implement the mobile slide-in drawer using framer-motion for smooth staggered list item reveals. Ensure floating 'Book Now' button is pulsing and fixed to bottom on mobile, bottom-right on desktop.
Team Section: Strict adherence to the reference design - vertical cards with initial-avatar on top (cream bg) and a sage green block at bottom containing name and role.
Implement the complex animations: Ken burns hero zoom, staggered word reveal, animated underlines, counter animation for 5.0 Google/4.7 Yelp ratings, and page load overlay.
Use lucide-react for icons (Star, Menu, X, Facebook, Instagram, etc.).
